analysis.summary: Flight search 'max price' filter returns the most expensive flights
analysis.description:
Searching flights with a maximum price returns only flights that cost MORE than the limit, instead of flights at or under it.
Steps to reproduce:
Call GET /flights/search?max_price=200
Observe that only flights priced above 200 are returned
Expected behaviour:
The results include only flights whose price is less than or equal to the given max_price.
Affected file:
backend/app/services/flight_service.py (search_flights)

analysis.summary: Paid extras lower the total when included while creating a booking
analysis.description:
When a new booking is created with paid extras, each extra reduces the total price instead of adding to it.
Steps to reproduce:
Create a booking and include a paid extra (e.g. extra baggage)
Observe the booking total is lower than the base fare
Expected behaviour:
Each extra added at creation increases the booking total by the extra's price.
Affected file:
backend/app/services/booking_service.py (create_booking)

analysis.summary: Flight search by destination airport returns no results
analysis.description:
Searching flights by destination airport always returns an empty list, even for airports that clearly have flights.
Steps to reproduce:
Call GET /flights/search?destination=jfk
Observe that no flights are returned although JFK has scheduled flights
Expected behaviour:
The destination filter matches regardless of the casing of the supplied airport code (airport codes are stored in upper case).
Affected file:
backend/app/services/flight_service.py (search_flights)

analysis.summary: Sorting flight search by price does not order by price
analysis.description:
Requesting flight search results sorted by price returns them ordered by departure time instead, and the default ordering is swapped too.
Steps to reproduce:
Call GET /flights/search?sort_by=price
Observe the results are not ordered from cheapest to most expensive
Expected behaviour:
sort_by=price orders results by price; the default orders by departure time.
Affected file:
backend/app/services/flight_service.py (search_flights)

analysis.summary: Browsing a knowledge topic returns articles from every other topic
analysis.description:
Fetching articles for a specific knowledge topic returns all the articles that do NOT belong to that topic.
Steps to reproduce:
Request the articles for a topic (e.g. 'baggage')
Observe that the results are from unrelated topics instead
Expected behaviour:
Only articles whose topic matches the requested topic are returned.
Affected file:
backend/app/services/knowledge_service.py (get_by_topic)

analysis.summary: Available seat count is inflated on flight details
analysis.description:
The number of available seats reported for a flight is too high. It is computed as total + booked instead of total - booked.
Steps to reproduce:
Open any flight's details
Observe that available_seats exceeds the aircraft capacity
Expected behaviour:
Available seats equal the total seats minus the booked seats.
Affected file:
backend/app/db/seat_inventory.py (seat_inventory_counts)

analysis.summary: Adding extras to a booking lowers the total price instead of raising it
analysis.description:
Adding paid extras to an existing booking reduces the total price instead of increasing it.
Steps to reproduce:
Add a paid extra to a booking
Observe the booking total goes down by the extra's price
Expected behaviour:
Each added extra increases the booking total by the extra's price.
Affected file:
backend/app/services/booking_service.py (add_extras)

analysis.summary: Booking total price is calculated incorrectly for multiple passengers
analysis.description:
When creating a booking, the base total is wrong for more than one passenger. It adds the passenger count to the fare instead of multiplying.
Steps to reproduce:
Create a booking for a 200.00 flight with 3 passengers
Observe the base total is 203.00 instead of 600.00
Expected behaviour:
The base total equals the flight price multiplied by the number of passengers.
Affected file:
backend/app/services/booking_service.py (create_booking)

analysis.summary: Knowledge base search misses articles that match in the middle of the text
analysis.description:
Searching the knowledge base only returns articles whose topic/title/content START with the query. Matches that occur in the middle of a field are missed.
Steps to reproduce:
Search for a word that appears mid-sentence in an article's content
Observe that the article is not returned
Expected behaviour:
Search performs a contains match, returning any article where the query appears anywhere in the topic, title, or content.
Affected file:
backend/app/services/knowledge_service.py (search)

analysis.summary: Flight search by origin airport returns no results
analysis.description:
Searching flights by origin airport always returns an empty list, even for airports that clearly have flights.
Steps to reproduce:
Call GET /flights/search?origin=ath
Observe that no flights are returned although ATH has scheduled flights
Expected behaviour:
The origin filter matches regardless of the casing of the supplied airport code (airport codes are stored in upper case).
Affected file:
backend/app/services/flight_service.py (search_flights)
